description:
Product information
Battery type: Polymer lithium ion battery
Applicable type: General purpose
Battery type: Soft case
Shell material: Plastic
Additional function: Multi-U port output
Size: 94 * 63 * 24mm
Color: White, black, blue, pink, red
Power capacity: 4800mA, 8000mA, 10000mA, 20000mA

Rated output: DC1: 5V/2.1A Rated input: DC: 5V/2A
Rated output: DC2: 5V/2.1A Rated input: DC: 5V/2A
